articles.headline: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Is Weston McKennie USMNT's most important player?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew debate who is USMNT's most important player going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Does Christian Pulisic need to improve his form before the World Cup?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss Christian Pulisic's form leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Do USMNT have a problem vs. European teams?
articles.description: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss the USMNT's form going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

images.name: Do USMNT have a problem vs. European teams?
images.caption: The 'Futbol Americas' crew discuss the USMNT's form going into the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

articles.headline: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
articles.description: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

images.name: Marcotti: Pochettino should want answers about Crocker's resignation
images.caption: Gab Marcotti speaks about Matt Crocker's decision to quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation.

articles.headline: Mauricio Pochettino's injury crisis with the USMNT
articles.description: Herc Gomez and Ale Moreno discuss Tyler Adams being added to a long list of injured players for Mauricio Pochettino's USMNT.

images.name: Mauricio Pochettino's injury crisis with the USMNT
images.caption: Herc Gomez and Ale Moreno discuss Tyler Adams being added to a long list of injured players for Mauricio Pochettino's USMNT.

articles.headline: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
articles.description: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

images.name: Why Weah & McKennie could be 'casualties' in Pochettino's system
images.caption: Herc Gomez discusses why he thinks Timothy Weah and Weston McKennie could be left out USMNT new system under Mauricio Pochettino.

keyEvents.text: Goal!  Panama 1, Qatar 0. Yoel Bárcenas (Panama) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Éric Davis with a cross.
Substitution, Qatar. Mahdi Salem replaces Hazem Shehata.
Goal!  Panama 2, Qatar 0. Ismael Díaz (Panama) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Adalberto Carrasquilla.
Goal!  Panama 3, Qatar 0. Ismael Díaz (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Panama 4, Qatar 0. Ismael Díaz (Panama) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by José Fajardo.
Substitution, Qatar. Jassem Gaber replaces Assim Madibo.
Substitution, Qatar. Abdullah Marafee replaces Ali Asad.
Substitution, Panama. Cristian Martínez replaces Adalberto Carrasquilla.
Substitution, Panama. Cecilio Waterman replaces Ismael Díaz.
Substitution, Panama. César Yanis replaces Alberto Quintero.
Substitution, Panama. Jovani Welch replaces Aníbal Godoy.
Substitution, Qatar. Khalid Muneer replaces Almoez Ali.
Substitution, Panama. Roderick Miller replaces Hárold Cummings.

First Half begins.
